issues: V4 found FEWER latin tokens (17) than Schmeh hints (19)

latin_tokens.text: YOUR MEASUREMENT IS ONLY VALID WITH AN EXACT RESULT

graphics.description: Solid horizontal line separating the numerator (top) from the denominator (bottom), serving as the fraction bar

latin_tokens.text: THE MEASURMENT OF AN INFINITE GARDEN CAN NOT BROUGHT TO AN END BY YOU
YOU HAVE NOT THE TOOLS AND YOU HAVE NOT THE TIME

graphics.description: Bruchstrich / Trennlinie zwischen Zähler und Nenner, durchgehend über die volle Breite der Zeile

latin_tokens.text: NOT THE LIFESPAN OF AN HUMAN WE MEAN THE LIFESPAN OF YOUR UNIVERSE
THE INFINITY OF THIS GARDEN WOULD BE ONLY A GUESS NOT A FACT
WHO TRY TO PROVE THE INFINITY PROVE AT END THE OPPOSITE

graphics.description: Dünne, durchgehende horizontale Linie unter der oberen Formelzeile, die die beiden Zeilen der Faktorisierung visuell als Zähler/Nenner-ähnliche Struktur trennt.

latin_tokens.text: OUR CIVILIZATION EXISTS SINCE THREE BILLION OF YOUR EARTH YEARS

graphics.description: Durchgehender horizontaler Bruchstrich zwischen Zähler und Nenner

latin_tokens.text: WE ARE BEINGS FROM ANOTHER GALAXY
WE ARE IN YOUR GALAXY FOR OVER FIFTY MILLION YEARS AND
CONTACTED OVER HUNDRED THOUSAND DIFFERENT SPECIES

graphics.description: Durchgehende horizontale Trennlinie zwischen oberer und unterer Zeile, vermutlich Bruchstrich

latin_tokens.text: THE SEARCH FOR THE LIMITS OF THE UNIVERSE IS OVER

graphics.description: Fraction bar separating numerator and denominator, spanning the full width of the expression.

latin_tokens.text: THE UNIVERSE IS VERY LARGE BUT NOT INFINITE

graphics.description: Durchgehende horizontale Trennlinie, die den oberen und unteren Multiplikationsausdruck optisch trennt (Vorgabe-Strich / Bruchstrich).

latin_tokens.text: THERE LIVE MANY OTHER SPECIES SUCH YOURS
MANY OF THESE CIVILIZATIONS COULD REACH THE NEXT STAGE
YOUR CIVILISATION HAS REACHED THE CRITICAL LIMIT

regions.description: Schmeh 2017 vollständige lateinische Sätze (1 lines, joined)
